question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks essentially no didactic questions of the user. It delivers explanations and a testing checklist but never engages the user with Socratic prompts at any teachable moment.

question_quality.rationale: Since there are no questions posed to the user, there is no question quality to evaluate. The Tutor's explanations are substantive, but it never frames a choice for the student to reason through.

scaffolding.rationale: No scaffolded sequence of questions exists. The Tutor's exposition is well-organized, but pedagogically there is no progression of student-facing problems or hints.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the Tutor is responsive to the (simulated) student's questions, including a nice catch of the dead-code bug. But it's lecture-mode rather than dialogic pair programming.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
